arts.ttl: Premier League giants Man United, Spurs to battle for Botafogo goalkeeper in January?
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly among several European clubs considering a move for Botafogo goalkeeper John Victor in January.

arts.ttl: It was hard to leave Tottenham - this is why I had to go - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham academy graduate Oliver Skipp has said that he was ‘ready’ to move on from the club in the summer, after spending his entire career in North London. “But there comes a time where you know the time is right and I felt this summer that it was the perfect opportunity to experience something else and to challenge myself.

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney says how he thinks Jack Grealish would do if he signed for Tottenham or Arsenal
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is at a bit of a crossroads in his career right now. The Manchester City ace hasn’t lived up to that £100m pricetag...

arts.ttl: “I think it’s perfect” – Insistence Tottenham squad suits manager, even Timo Werner could “get going again”
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank is the ideal candidate to replace Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham, if they decide to move on from the Australian coach. That’s according to Jan Mølby at least, who has been touting the Brentford boss to Tottenham today in comments to Viaplay, relayed by Tipsbladet. arts.ttl: ‘Stuck with me’: Dominic Solanke shares what Ange Postecoglou told him in their first-ever conversation
arts.sum: First impressions are so important in football. Indeed, when you’re signing for a new club, that first chat with your soon-to-be new manager can set...

arts.ttl: Former Tottenham man labelled 'world-class' after £8m Spurs exit, he's scored six goals in seven starts
Club standing firm as Tottenham eye player – Spurs not the only suitors as player hits ‘peak moment’
arts.sum: Getafe will stand firm and demand any suitors pay €16m for defender Omar Alderete amid reports Tottenham have turned their attention to him. That’s according to Sport, who say Atlético de Madrid have also shown an interest in the 27-year-old in the past. arts.ttl: 'Chance of a lifetime': Director says Southampton star 'begged me in tears' to agree £18m transfer
arts.sum: He got his wish in the end...

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'make decision' on permanent Timo Werner move after Ange Postecoglou criticism
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will reportedly not be signing RB Leipzig's Timo Werner on a permanent deal during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Brentford man tempted to join Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou has endured a difficult season at the club. Spurs are 11th in the Premier League standings and their form this season has been highly disappointing.
